title: pastinaca kochii subsp. kochii
intro: Pastinaca kochii subsp. kochii, also known as Kochia or Bastard Cockscomb, is a plant species in the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pastinaca kochii subsp. kochii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes used in tinctures and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
